features.name: Discord Gateway
features.description: Real-time Discord Bot API integration with slash commands and message handling.

features.name: Claude Code Subprocess Runner
features.description: Spawns claude -p subprocess, parses streaming JSON, and classifies errors.

features.name: Session Manager
features.description: Manages Claude session lifecycle: creation, idle timeout, expiry, and summaries.

features.name: Persistent Memory Store
features.description: SQLite-backed conversation storage and FTS5 knowledge store with context assembly.

features.name: Smart Model Routing
features.description: Three-tier smart routing (haiku/sonnet/opus) with department hints and override prefixes.

features.name: Autonomy Layer
features.description: Phase 5 orchestration facade wiring guardrails, trust scores, tiers, and escalation.

features.name: Input/Output Guardrails
features.description: Input/output validation and prompt injection detection for all messages.

features.name: Trust Scoring
features.description: Per-capability trust scoring (0-100) that gates autonomous execution.

features.name: Skill Tier Management
features.description: Manages skill tiers: A (auto-deploy), B (approval required), C (manual only).

features.name: Escalation Engine
features.description: Four-level escalation system with quiet hours, de-escalation, and defer support.

features.name: Hybrid Search
features.description: RRF fusion of FTS5 keyword search and vector semantic search for memory retrieval.

features.name: Local Embeddings Engine
features.description: Local embedding generation via ONNX/CoreML/hash fallback without network calls.

features.name: Vector Store
features.description: SQLite-backed vector store with optional sqlite-vec ANN indexing.

features.name: Multi-Agent Tmux Manager
features.description: Background agent spawning and lifecycle management via tmux sessions.

features.name: Tool Isolation
features.description: Per-agent MCP config filtering to restrict tool access in multi-agent scenarios.

features.name: Skill Evolution Engine
features.description: Detects recurring failure patterns, generates skill proposals, and auto-deploys Tier A skills.

features.name: Routing Feedback Engine
features.description: Tracks tool/model performance and triggers auto-escalation on repeated failures.

features.name: Temporal Knowledge Store
features.description: Time-aware versioned knowledge entries with rollback and staleness detection.

features.name: Few-Shot Learning Store
features.description: In-context learning from successful interactions to improve future responses.

features.name: Mission Control REST API
features.description: aiohttp REST API + WebSocket server with 33 endpoints for the Mission Control dashboard.

features.name: Task Pipeline
features.description: Structured Kanban task pipeline with state machine transitions (inbox through done/failed).

features.name: Quality Gate
features.description: Code review quality gates with approval workflow and automated checks.

features.name: GitHub Webhook Receiver
features.description: Inbound GitHub webhook handler with HMAC-SHA256 signature verification.

features.name: Daily Budget Enforcement
features.description: Enforces daily API spend limits with pressure signals and budget alerts.

features.name: Circuit Breaker
features.description: Failure detection and automatic recovery via open/half-open/closed state machine.
